query:
SELECT id, connectionId, locationAddress, serviceType, supplierName, customerName
FROM services
WHERE (
  locationAddress LIKE '%MARYBOROUGH%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%CLEVELAND%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%KIPPA%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%BRENDALE%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%TORQUAY%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%COOLUM%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%SIPPY%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%CREEK ST%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%CORONATION%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%SOUTH BRISBANE%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%MELBOURNE ST%'
)
AND serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Data', 'Broadband')
ORDER BY id;
